title: ononis tridentata var. intermedia
intro: Ononis tridentata var. intermedia, also known as the Spurred Restharrow or intermediate restharrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of isoflavones, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and cardiovascular issues, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the Spurred Restharrow can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
